prompt: Hero has 8c7d on 9s6h2c. How many outs improve hero to a straight on the turn?
why_v1: Any 5 or T completes the straight, which gives 8 clean outs.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Any 5 or T completes the straight, so this open-ended draw has 8 outs.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This open-ended straight draw has 8 outs because both ends of the straight can complete.
